name: Figma
description: Primary design tool for UI design, prototyping, and design system management. Used daily for everything from quick sketches to production-ready specs.

name: React
description: Go-to framework for building interactive UIs. I bridge the gap between design and code by implementing my own designs in React.

name: Framer Motion
description: Animation library for React that brings designs to life with physics-based motion, gestures, and layout animations.

name: Tailwind CSS
description: Utility-first CSS framework that speeds up styling while maintaining design consistency through a shared token system.

name: TypeScript
description: Adds type safety to JavaScript, making large codebases more maintainable and catching bugs before they reach production.

name: Storybook
description: Component development environment for building, documenting, and testing UI components in isolation.

name: Notion
description: Research documentation, project planning, and design decision logs. Keeps the entire design process transparent and searchable.

name: Miro
description: Collaborative whiteboard for remote workshops, affinity mapping, journey mapping, and design sprints.

name: VS Code
description: Primary code editor with a carefully curated set of extensions for React, TypeScript, and Tailwind development.

name: Vercel
description: Deployment platform for frontend projects. Enables instant previews for every pull request and zero-config deployments.
